description: Assemble three overlapping Sanger sequencing reads of an Escherichia coli 16S rRNA gene from ~/UGENE_Data/16s_assembly/ecoli_16s_reads.fasta into a single continuous consensus sequence. Export the consensus sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/16s_assembly/results/16s_consensus.fasta. Additionally, generate a report at ~/UGENE_Data/16s_assembly/results/assembly_report.txt documenting the number of reads assembled, the final consensus length in base pairs, and which specific read was reverse-complemented to match the forward strand.
